query:
-- Get all TIAB services that are unmatched (no customerId) or have contact info
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.externalId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.customerId,
  s.supplierName,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.monthlyCost
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName IN ('TIAB', 'Octane', 'Inabox')
   OR s.planName LIKE '%4G%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%SIM%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%TIAB%'
ORDER BY s.customerName
LIMIT 100;
